summary: Creates a flat rectangular grid mesh with configurable rows, columns, and size. One of the most common geometry primitives for 2D surfaces and instancing layouts.

key_params.name: orient
key_params.note: Orientation plane: XY, XZ, or YZ

common_gotchas: Default orientation is XZ (horizontal floor); switch to XY for a vertical screen-facing plane.
High row/col counts increase vertex count quadratically — 1000x1000 = 1M vertices.
